name: confirm-requirements-plugin
description: Adds a /confirm-requirements skill that interactively walks through requirements already documented in docs/requirements/ to validate and refine them. For each requirement: re-reads it back to the user, checks whether the underlying assumptions still hold, asks whether linked open questions have been resolved since, pressure-tests fit criteria, applies the INCOSE quality checklist, identifies new edge cases, and advances status (Draft → Reviewed → Approved) when criteria are met. Companion to /repo-requirements: that one elicits, this one refines.
